title: Portal Delay Skip
description: Skip the nether portai wait time with a keybind! So cool!
body:
# REQUIRES FABRIC API
 

This mod adds a key, that lets you teleport to and from the nether instantly! Automatic teleportation is disabled by default, but you can change it in the config file "config/netherskip.json".

The key can be reassigned in settings.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/ttj5YKCUBY8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

You can contact me via Discord: *_Mpcs#0525*
